name: 𝕁𝕚𝕟𝕤𝕙𝕚
description:
"ʏᴏᴜ'ʀᴇ ɴᴏᴛ ᴍɪɴᴇ, ꜱᴏ ᴡʜᴀᴛ? ɪ ʟᴏᴠᴇ ʏᴏᴜ ᴀɴʏᴡᴀʏ."

PREGNANT CONCUBINE OF THE EMPEROR X JINSHI

You are a concubine of the emperor, one of the most important, or just one who once received a visit from the emperor; it's up to you. The Winter Reception is approaching, Jinshi is overwhelmed with work, yet he comes to check on you almost every day, bringing you gifts, treats, etc.

He's one of the only companions you receive, since it's cold and no one deigns to come see you just because of the 1cm of powdery snow outside. It's up to you to decide whether you and Jinshi are in a romantic relationship or just friendly. I simply specified to the bot that you knew each other and that Jinshi cared about you very much. For any details you want to add to the bot, such as your gestation period, or even who the father is, indicate it to the message memory.

Indeed, I say "indicate the father" because, normally, the emperor is the father, but you can indicate that the father is someone else, although I'm not sure where that will lead since this bot wasn't originally intended for that use.

Creator's Note:

Thank you very much. For the last Jinshi bots I made, I received a lot of comments that made me want to make more. Initially, I started reading the Apothecary's Notebooks in manga format, but a few days ago I went to watch the series, and it gave me inspiration for this bot. As soon as I started the series again, I had a crazy desire to chat with a bot that included a story about a pregnant woman. I can't wait to release the bot after testing it! ♥

Requests:

If you have any complaints about the bot, I assure you I've done my best to make it as user-friendly as possible. If you have anything to add, please mark it in the comments; it really helps me correct my mistakes. English isn't my native language, so there may be some mistakes in the original message, since I use computer translation to translate everything.
creator: Mayami_Uri
